authority_boundary: Source registry for validator.microcosm.axiom_support_cover ceiling component ownership; it defines which dimensions have order owners and which remain explicit unknowns, but it does not certify axiom strength or release authority.

components.claim_effect: May order the evidence-class component only; it cannot raise support across unknown scope, provenance, freshness, authority, projection, or rejection-mapping gaps.
anti_claims: Evidence class rank is a disclosure aid, not proof of general axiom maturity.
A high evidence class cannot launder an unowned component into support.

components.claim_effect: May order the checker-scope component only; it cannot raise support across provenance, freshness, domain, authority, projection, or rejection-mapping gaps.
anti_claims: A bound checker surface is not proof of checker completeness, suite breadth, semantic adequacy, release authority, or public readiness.
Negative-case references in checker code cannot launder endpoint coverage into anti-axiom rejection proof.

components.claim_effect: May order the provenance-class component only; it cannot raise support across checker scope, freshness, domain, authority, projection, or rejection-mapping gaps.
anti_claims: A resolved provenance class is material classification, not proof of evidence freshness, release authority, or public readiness.
Receipt and bundle presence cannot launder endpoint coverage into anti-axiom rejection proof.

components.claim_effect: May order the freshness-state component only; without a source-owned refresh contract it remains an ordered unknown and cannot raise support.
anti_claims: A deterministic basis digest is not enough to claim live freshness strength.
Current file existence, receipt presence, and generated projection freshness cannot become live support freshness proof.

components.claim_effect: May order the domain-scope component only; it cannot raise support across freshness or rejection-mapping gaps.
anti_claims: Endpoint or fixture coverage cannot be promoted to domain-general proof.
Organ-local and public-copy coverage cannot become substrate-general proof.

components.claim_effect: Orders only whether a negative case is absent, declared, or found in a bound checker surface; it is separate from anti-axiom rejection mapping.
anti_claims: Negative-case status is not anti-axiom rejection proof.
Endpoint coverage is not propagation proof.

components.claim_effect: May order the authority-scope component only; it cannot raise support across freshness, domain, projection, or rejection-mapping gaps.
anti_claims: Validator authority cannot silently become release or source-mutation authority.
A source binding plus read-only evaluator cannot become public-readiness or anti-axiom rejection proof.

components.claim_effect: May order the projection-scope component only; it cannot raise support across freshness, domain, or rejection-mapping gaps.
anti_claims: Generated support-cover output is not source evidence for itself.
Markdown, atlas cards, public copy, and generated doctrine-lattice projections cannot raise support.

unknown_dimension_policy: explicitly_unowned components are emitted as unknown_no_order_owner witness gaps and extend pressure; they are not bottom, not strong, and not support proof.
anti_claims: This registry makes the support calculus more inspectable, not greener.
Adding a component order owner is evaluator grammar and must still be consumed by validator code before it can affect a support ceiling.
No component order can override unverified anti-axiom rejection mappings.
